title: NHSN Hospital Respiratory Data (HRD) Dashboard | NHSN | CDC
text:
capacity, and occupancy to CDC’s NHSN. These data provide ongoing situational awareness and insight into current patient health and safety needs and inform CDC’s public health response to respiratory pathogens.
For more information regarding NHSN’s collection of these data, including full reporting guidance, visit: NHSN Hospital Respiratory Data .
This page includes data on:
Hospital admissions of patients with COVID-19, influenza, and RSV (overall and by age group, with associated admissions levels) 
Inpatient and intensive care unit (ICU) hospital bed capacity and occupancy, and occupancy among patients with COVID-19, influenza, and RSV (overall and by age group) 
Reporting levels for each metric 
These data are updated on Fridays, for data reported through the previous Saturday.
National Hospital Reporting Statistics, Most Recent Week Weekly Total New Hospital Admissions, United States Hospital Inpatient and ICU Bed Occupancy, United States 
Patients with Respiratory Illnesses in the ICU, United States 
How to use the NHSN Hospital Respiratory Data (HRD) interactive dashboards 
Select a stratification of interest 
To use the NHSN HRD interactive dashboards (Weekly Total New Hospital Admissions, Hospital Inpatient and ICU Bed Occupancy, Patients with Respiratory Illnesses in the ICU), select a stratification option from the buttons on the left. Stratificatio
